subject: A tall slender figure in white and teal robes holding a long staff, extending one arm outward in a dynamic pose against a cosmic starfield with radiating green energy beams
description: A full-figure scene in DBS card art style showing a tall, slender figure in flowing white robes with teal and green accents. The figure stands in a dynamic stance — one arm extended outward with an open palm, the other holding a long ornate staff. Green and white energy beams radiate outward from their position against a deep cosmic background of stars and spatial depth. The card title identifies the figure as Vados. The palette is white, teal, green, and deep space navy.
foreground: Robed figure extending arm with staff, radiating energy
background: Cosmic starfield with radiating green energy beams
emotion: commanding confidence — the extended arm is an act of authority or assistance
